languages.text: {n}Негромкий смех Тразина сопровождается ледяным холодком по вашей спине.{/n} "Я знаю, о чем говорит этот слуга. Мне известны эти древние врата и то, что скрывается за ними. Этот путь приведет тебя ко мне".

{n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."
languages.original_text: {n}Негромкий смех Тразина сопровождается ледяным холодком по вашей спине.{/n} "Я знаю, о чем говорит этот слуга. Мне известны эти древние врата и то, что скрывается за ними. Этот путь приведет тебя ко мне".

{n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."

languages.text: {n}La suave risa de Trazyn viene acompañada de un escalofrío.{/n} «Sé muy bien de qué habla este sirviente. Conozco estas puertas antiguas y lo que esconden. Este camino te traerá hasta mí».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."

traits.locale_text: {n}La suave risa de Trazyn viene acompañada de un escalofrío.{/n} «Sé muy bien de qué habla este sirviente. Conozco estas puertas antiguas y lo que esconden. Este camino te traerá hasta mí».

languages.text: {n}特拉金轻柔的笑声响起，一股寒意顺着你的脊背缓缓向下蔓延。{/n}“我很清楚这位仆从说的是什么。我知晓那些远古之门，以及它们背后隐藏的东西。这条路会将你引到我的面前。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金轻柔的笑声响起，一股寒意顺着你的脊背缓缓向下蔓延。{/n}“我很清楚这位仆从说的是什么。我知晓那些远古之门，以及它们背后隐藏的东西。这条路会将你引到我的面前。”

languages.text: {n}Trazyns sanftes Lachen wird von einer Eiseskälte begleitet, die dir das Blut in den Adern gefrieren lässt.{/n} "Ich weiß sehr genau, wovon dieser Diener spricht. Ich weiß von diesen alten Toren und was sich hinter ihnen verbirgt. Dieser Weg wird dich zu mir führen."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyns sanftes Lachen wird von einer Eiseskälte begleitet, die dir das Blut in den Adern gefrieren lässt.{/n} "Ich weiß sehr genau, wovon dieser Diener spricht. Ich weiß von diesen alten Toren und was sich hinter ihnen verbirgt. Dieser Weg wird dich zu mir führen."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn se fend d'un rire entendu qui vous fait froid dans le dos.{/n} « Je vois très bien de quoi parle ce serviteur. Je suis au courant de l'existence de ces portes ancestrales et de ce qui se cache derrière. Cette voie vous mènera tout droit jusqu'à moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn se fend d'un rire entendu qui vous fait froid dans le dos.{/n} « Je vois très bien de quoi parle ce serviteur. Je suis au courant de l'existence de ces portes ancestrales et de ce qui se cache derrière. Cette voie vous mènera tout droit jusqu'à moi. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn'in hafif kahkahasına omurganızdan aşağı inen buz gibi bir ürperti eşlik ediyor.{/n} "Bu hizmetkârın neden bahsettiğini gayet iyi biliyorum. Bu kadim geçitlerin ve arkalarında neyin saklı olduğunun farkındayım. Bu yol seni bana getirecek."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn'in hafif kahkahasına omurganızdan aşağı inen buz gibi bir ürperti eşlik ediyor.{/n} "Bu hizmetkârın neden bahsettiğini gayet iyi biliyorum. Bu kadim geçitlerin ve arkalarında neyin saklı olduğunun farkındayım. Bu yol seni bana getirecek."

languages.text:
{n}トラズンの優しい笑い声は、背筋をぞくっとさせるような寒さをもたらす。{/n}
「このしもべが語ることはよく知っている。この古代の門と、その裏に隠されたもの。この道は君を私のもとに導く。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."
